transcription.text: uh when can i pick up the pictures thursday this thursday okay let me make a note of that you're gonna write it down there what's going on then let's say tuesday you mean two days earlier no five days later i thought as much as this customer we're at a photomat store we'd be introducing him to a brand new picture pickup promise photomats way of telling you exactly when your pictures will be ready that quick sure and if it doesn't work out you get a free roll of film oh no no no you get in trouble for that it's no problem it's a photomat policy the photomat picture pickup promise their photomat store
